thinking.text:
Good, the Platinum Rewards Card does have a referral program documented. Now, since the previous referral was rejected due to the weekly cap (and not due to any issue with the friend or card), the user could try again now that enough time has passed. I should provide the user with the discoverable tool `get_referral_link` so they can generate a new referral link for their friend to use.

Let me give them the tool.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Great question! Since the rejection happened because of the **weekly limit cap** back in October, and plenty of time has passed since then (we're in November), your friend is welcome to reapply. If they do, you would be able to get the referral bonus — as long as no other weekly cap issues arise.

Here's what you can do: I can provide you with a tool that you can use to generate a **new referral link** for the Platinum Rewards Card. You simply pass your user ID and the card name, and it will generate a fresh link you can share with your friend.

Let me give that to you now.
